docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-23-2008 CONTINUED TO JUL-25-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR ENTRY OF ORDER GRANTING JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADING AND JUDGMENT THEREON.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTERO, DINNAH M $2,472.51 PRINCIPAL, $520.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $163.93 INTEREST, $267.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,423.44, (FOLLOWING THE GRANTING OF PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS) SEE SCANNED DOC (NO S.A.S.E., COPY IN 301 OUT BOX)

MINI MINUTES:
